features: Sure Women Cotton Dry Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant 50 ml provides 48-hour protection against sweat and odour
This anti-perspirant women's deodorant features Sure’s innovative MotionSense technology – the more you move, the more it protects
Sure anti-perspirant helps keep you fresh, dry and protected from morning to night
This roll on deodorant for women has a light, clean fragrance that gives you the confidence to keep going, no matter how hard you push yourself
Our anti-perspirant contains no alcohol* and is gentle enough for everyday use
Sure Women Cotton Dry Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant allows you to always be protected and feel confident whatever happens. Sure, it won’t let you down
description: Product Description Every second counts, whether you’re running late or running to beat your personal best. Nothing should distract you from your focus – especially not sweat. Sure Women Cotton Dry Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant is formulated to provide 48-hour protection against sweat and odour so you can feel fresh, dry and protected all day long. This roll on deodorant for women uses Sure’s innovative MotionSense technology to release bursts of light, clean fragrance inspired by fresh cotton sheets when you need it most. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, friction breaks those microcapsules releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. That fresh scent stays with you no matter how hard you push yourself. When you work hard, Sure works harder. Whether you're looking for daily protection or an added boost for a specific activity, feel unstoppable and fresh all day with this alcohol-free* anti-perspirant women's deodorant roll on. For days that don’t need interruptions. Freshness and protection in one swipe. Sure. It won’t let you down. How to use: Before applying, ensure underarms are dry. Roll on in circular motions, checking coverage is even on both underarms. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. *ethyl alcohol Ingredients Aqua, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Steareth-2, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Steareth-20, Parfum, Calcium Chloride, Glycine, Disodium EDTA, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-di-t-butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
